text: My app crashes when trying to open settings. It just... stops. Help!
I am experiencing an unusual issue with the software. It crashes every time I attempt to open the settings panel. Could you assist me with this problem?
I received my order but it’s not what I ordered. Like, I’m really confused. I thought I got the blue shirt, but I got a red one. Not happy with this!

I can't believe I have to deal with this again. I've reached out multiple times about my order, and it seems like nobody is taking this seriously. The last time I contacted support, they said they would follow up, but it's been weeks! I've even provided all the details they asked for, including my previous ticket numbers. It feels like I'm just being ignored. Is this how you treat loyal customers? I expect better.
Hey, do u guys ship to Norway? Thx!
Is there like any updates on that thing we talked about? Not sure if I missed it.

I recently attempted to change the email associated with my account, but I keep receiving an error message stating that the email is already in use. I've double-checked that this is not the case for any of my previous accounts, and I would appreciate your guidance on how to resolve this issue as soon as possible.
